title: Cloudy to partly cloudy with the possibility of rain on Tuesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, no weather warnings have been issued for Tuesday 29 April.

Light rain can be expected later today.


> Here are your expected weather conditions:


Western Cape:Morning fog along the coasts, otherwise cloudy to partly cloudy and cool to warm with light rain over the south-western spreading to the southern parts from the evening.

The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly along the south-west coast in the early morning, otherwise moderate to fresh south-westerly to westerly but strong along the west coast.

The expected UVB sunburn index: High

Western half of the Eastern CapeFine and warm, becoming partly cloudy but cool along the coast.

The wind along the coast will be Moderate south-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFine and warm, becoming partly cloudy in places south-westerly in the afternoon.

The wind along the coast will be Moderate south-westerly.

Expected temperatures on Tuesday 29 April

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
